column3: "Witch Hazel reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and redness caused by irritation or injury, providing relief for affected areas.

"Witch Hazel relieves pain and soreness" refers to its ability to soothe discomfort by using a plant-based extract that has anti-inflammatory properties, reducing swelling and easing pain from minor injuries or muscle issues.
"Witch Hazel promotes wound healing" refers to its ability to speed up and aid the natural process of closing up a cut or injury, resulting in faster recovery time.
"Witch Hazel soothes irritated skin" refers to its ability to provide relief for skin that is itchy, red, or inflamed due to some causes like allergies or minor injuries.
"Witch Hazel helps with digestion" refers to its ability to aid in proper stomach functioning by promoting regularity, easing discomfort, and enhancing the overall digestive process.
"Witch Hazel reduces fever" refers to its ability to help lower body temperature during fevers by utilizing natural components found within it.

"Witch Hazel calms the mind and nerves" refers to its ability to have soothing properties which can help reduce mental stress, anxiety, or nervousness when applied topically or used internally as per the recommended doses or forms of usage.

"Witch Hazel supports oral health" refers to its ability to naturally help maintain good dental hygiene due to its astringent properties that can reduce inflammation and fight bacteria in the mouth, ensuring better overall oral well-being.
"Witch Hazel improves circulation" refers to its ability to help boost blood flow in veins and arteries, ensuring better oxygen and nutrient delivery throughout the body.
"Witch Hazel boosts immunity" refers to its ability to naturally support or strengthen our body's defenses, potentially helping us fight off illnesses more effectively.
